name: Pumpkin Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Place whole graham crackers in a 13 X 9-inch pan.
2. Melt margarine and brush over the crackers.
3. Put cream cheese in a bowl and beat with an electric mixer.
4. Mix spices in pumpkin and add to the cream cheese.
5. Beat together brown sugar, milk, and sprinkle in dry pudding mix.
6. Add pumpkin and cream cheese mixture. Beat until well blended.
7. Fold in Cool Whip.
8. Pour into the pan and spread over crackers.
9. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
